name: Fusilli Verde with Broccoli & Red Bell Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Broccoli, cut into florets and stems peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, lightly sauté the garlic and red bell pepper in olive oil over medium heat until fragrant.
2. Add the broccoli florets and stems, along with a few tablespoons of water. Cover and cook for 1-2 minutes until just tender.
3. Stir in the blanched peas and chopped tomatoes, then season with cayenne and thyme. Cover and continue cooking over medium heat for 5 to 10 minutes until the vegetables are heated through.
4. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook the fusilli pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
5. Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with the vegetable mixture. Toss to combine.
6. Season with additional salt if needed, then serve hot.
